SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.model.mode

Class EndlessMode

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.model.mode.EndlessMode
All Implemented Interfaces:
GameMode
public class EndlessMode extends Object implements GameMode
Endless gameplay mode with unlimited play until game over (Strategy Pattern). Tracks high scores, manages leaderboard (top 5), and provides statistics. Gameplay continues until board fills completely.

  • Constructor Details

    • EndlessMode

      public EndlessMode(GameService gameService, GuiController guiController)
      Constructs a new EndlessMode.
      Parameters:
      gameService - the core game service for game logic
      guiController - the GUI controller for UI updates

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Description copied from interface: GameMode
      Initializes the game mode with required setup. Configures game state, UI components, and mode-specific parameters. Must be called before starting gameplay.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface GameMode

    • update

      public void update()
      Description copied from interface: GameMode
      Updates the game state for the current frame. Performs mode-specific updates such as time limit checks, progress tracking, and UI synchronization. Called periodically during gameplay.
      Specified by:
      update in interface GameMode

    • getResult

      public GameResult getResult()
      Description copied from interface: GameMode
      Gets the result of the current game session.
      Specified by:
      getResult in interface GameMode
      Returns:
      the game result containing score, completion status, and other metrics. Returns null if the game has not been initialized or completed.

    • getType

      public GameModeType getType()
      Description copied from interface: GameMode
      Gets the type of this game mode.
      Specified by:
      getType in interface GameMode
      Returns:
      the game mode type, never null

    • onDownEvent

      public DownData onDownEvent(MoveEvent event)
      Description copied from interface: GameMode
      Handles the down movement event.
      Specified by:
      onDownEvent in interface GameMode
      Parameters:
      event - the move event containing movement information and source
      Returns:
      the down data result containing view data and line clear information. Returns null if the game is paused or the event cannot be processed.

    • onLeftEvent

      public ViewData onLeftEvent(MoveEvent event)
      Description copied from interface: GameMode
      Handles the left movement event.
      Specified by:
      onLeftEvent in interface GameMode
      Parameters:
      event - the move event containing movement information and source
      Returns:
      the view data result containing updated brick position and board state. Returns null if the game is paused or the movement is invalid.

    • onRightEvent

      public ViewData onRightEvent(MoveEvent event)
      Description copied from interface: GameMode
      Handles the right movement event.
      Specified by:
      onRightEvent in interface GameMode
      Parameters:
      event - the move event containing movement information and source
      Returns:
      the view data result containing updated brick position and board state. Returns null if the game is paused or the movement is invalid.

    • onRotateEvent

      public ViewData onRotateEvent(MoveEvent event)
      Description copied from interface: GameMode
      Handles the rotation event.
      Specified by:
      onRotateEvent in interface GameMode
      Parameters:
      event - the move event containing rotation information and source
      Returns:
      the view data result containing updated brick rotation and board state. Returns null if the game is paused or the rotation is invalid.

    • startNewGame

      public void startNewGame()
      Description copied from interface: GameMode
      Starts a new game in this mode.

      This method performs the following operations:

      • Resets the game state to initial conditions
      • Clears the game board
      • Initializes scoring and progression systems
      • Creates the first falling piece
      • Starts the game timer
      Specified by:
      startNewGame in interface GameMode

    • isGameOver

      public boolean isGameOver()
      Description copied from interface: GameMode
      Checks if the game is over.

      A game is considered over when:

      • A new piece cannot be placed on the board
      • The player reaches a losing condition
      • The game mode specific end condition is met
      Specified by:
      isGameOver in interface GameMode
      Returns:
      true if the game is over, false otherwise

    • pause

      public void pause()
      Description copied from interface: GameMode
      Pauses the game.

      When paused, the game will:

      • Stop the game timer and piece falling
      • Disable input processing
      • Maintain the current game state
      • Show pause indicators in the UI
      Specified by:
      pause in interface GameMode

    • resume

      public void resume()
      Description copied from interface: GameMode
      Resumes the game from a paused state.

      When resumed, the game will:

      • Restart the game timer and piece falling
      • Re-enable input processing
      • Continue from the previous game state
      • Hide pause indicators in the UI
      Specified by:
      resume in interface GameMode

    • getCurrentScore

      public int getCurrentScore()
      Description copied from interface: GameMode
      Gets the current score for this game session.
      Specified by:
      getCurrentScore in interface GameMode
      Returns:
      the current score as an integer value, never negative

    • getHighScore

      public int getHighScore()
      Description copied from interface: GameMode
      Gets the high score for this game mode.

      The high score represents the best score achieved in this specific game mode across all previous game sessions.

      Specified by:
      getHighScore in interface GameMode
      Returns:
      the high score as an integer value, never negative. Returns 0 if no high score has been set yet.

    • getGameStartTime

      public long getGameStartTime()
      Gets the game start time.
      Returns:
      the game start time in milliseconds
